aeo_readiness.summary: The website has a decent foundation for AEO with clear service offerings and localized content, but lacks depth in content and user engagement signals.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and provide fresh user-generated content.
Expand service pages with more detailed content, FAQs, and targeted keywords to improve relevance.
Implement a blog to regularly publish content related to HVAC services, energy efficiency, and local tips.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has localized content for Georgetown, TX, and surrounding areas, but lacks structured data for Google Business Profile (GBP).
gbp_analysis.summary: While the website is locally focused, it does not fully leverage GBP features, such as GBP posts, Q&A, and GBP-specific schema markup.
critical_issues: No active GBP listing or integration with the website.
Missing GBP-specific schema markup to enhance local search presence.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or missing Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web, which can hinder local search performance.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online directories, including Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local business listings.
Ensure NAP consistency across the website, social media profiles, and any other online platforms.
Claim and verify the Google Business Profile listing to manage NAP information and engage with customers.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema is missing detailed information such as opening hours, geo, and service area.
No schema markup for breadcrumbs, which can help search engines understand site structure.
Missing FAQPage schema to address common customer queries and improve SERP visibility.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of user engagement signals such as reviews, comments, and social shares.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Search engines may perceive the site as less authoritative due to the absence of fresh content and user interaction.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation system and regularly updating the site with relevant content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative content that establishes the business as a local HVAC authority and encourages backlinks.
